title: コマンド/voteの設計を見直す。このコマンドは最低でも3つの異なるエージェント、codex+claude+GLMなどの合議によって、大量ファイル削除などcriticalな挙動以外はユーザー認証を求めず、複数エージェントによる合議によってタスク終了まで完遂するという指示である。そのような設計となっているか確認せよ。その上で、設計をリデザインし、シュミレーション検証し、批判的吟味し、修正し、リプランする。これを3回繰り返して設計を洗練させた上で実装せよ。
summary_text: **Findings (highest risk first)** 1. Critical-operation policy is internally inconsistent with your requirement. `mass file deletion (10+)` is currently classified as “3-party consensus, no user confirmation” instead of mandatory user auth, and there is also a single-actor emergency override path. Refs: [dangerous-permission-consensus.md#L46](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/rules/dangerous-permission-consensus.md#L46), [dangerous-permission-consensus.md#L55](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/rules/dangerous-permission-consensus.md#L55), [dangerous-permission-consensus.md#L100](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/rules/dangerous-permission-consensus.md#L100) 2. “Minimum 3 distinct agents” is not hard-guaranteed in all runtime configurations. The guard/provider/bootstrap checks can be disabled by env flags, and trio enforcement can be waived/disabled in some paths (including Claude-degraded waiver). Refs: [codex-prompt-launch#L86](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/bin/codex-prompt-launch#L86), [codex-prompt-launch#L96](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/bin/codex-prompt-launch#L96), [codex-prompt-launch#L511](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/bin/codex-prompt-launch#L511), [aggregate-tutti-votes.sh#L49](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh#L49), [aggregate-tutti-votes.sh#L205](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh#L205), [run-local-orchestration.sh#L629](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L629) 3. Local `/vote` consensus is partially policy-driven rather than fully execution-enforced. It strongly enforces lane count/provider liveness, but not strict “final decision must be derived from Codex+Claude+GLM ballots for this task.” Refs: [vote.md#L29](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/vote.md#L29), [session_watch.py#L150](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/session_watch.py#L150), [session_watch.py#L179](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/session_watch.py#L179), [cli.py#L525](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/cli.py#L525) 4. GitHub `/vote` handoff auto-confirms implement intent by default (unless explicit review-only). This is aligned with autonomous completion, but increases risk if criticality classification is imperfect. Refs: [route-task-handoff.sh#L265](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh#L265), [route-task-handoff.sh#L283](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh#L283), [README.md#L249](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/README.md#L249) 5. Approval behavior is mostly contractual text, not a dedicated critical-action classifier gate in `/vote` itself. So “non-critical should never prompt auth” and “critical must prompt auth” are not uniformly machine-checked at the same boundary. Refs: [v.md#L22](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/v.md#L22), [vote.md#L40](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/vote.md#L40), [README.md#L65](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/README.md#L65) 6. Test coverage is strong for prompt-contract drift, but weak for critical-operation/auth semantics end-to-end. Current checks are mainly static prompt assertions + smoke markers, not destructive-action authorization simulation. Refs: [check-codex-vote-prompt.sh#L111](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh#L111), [check-codex-vote-prompt.sh#L151](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh#L151) **Net assessment** 現状は「3者合議を目指す設計」にはかなり寄っていますが、あなたの要件である「最低3エージェントを常時保証し、criticalのみ認証要求」を厳密に満たすには未達です。特に「mass deletion の扱い」と「設定で無効化できるガード」が主要な準拠ギャップです。
